scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @byoa/sdk && npm run build --workspace @byoa/react && npm run build --workspace @byoa/site && npm run build --workspace @byoa/runner
scripts.check: npm run build --workspace @byoa/sdk && npm run check --workspace @byoa/sdk && npm run check --workspace @byoa/react && npm run check --workspace @byoa/site && npm run check --workspace @byoa/runner
